chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 413 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.1815/2022 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 24.08.2023 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>>>...<<<<<<< None present for the petitioners. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. With the assistance of learned AAG Sindh, we have gone through the contents of the petition filed for seeking directions to Respondents for issuance of appointment orders to the petitioners against the post of police constables claiming that petitioners are successful candidates. However, the comments filed by the Respondents show that petitioners failed to secure 25 marks in interview, the benchmark needed to be surpassed for declaration as successful candidate. It appears that this factual position has not been denied by the petitioners by filing any rejoinder. We, therefore, find no merit in this petition and accordingly dismiss it along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
